overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing an armored character walking through a vast desert wasteland under dramatic cloudy skies. The character approaches a large rock formation, turns left to follow its base, and continues along a sandy ridge revealing distant cliffs and expansive open terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert plain approaching rock outcrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across flat sandy terrain toward a large rock formation in the distance

entered.detail: massive layered rock formation with flat top and steep sides
flat desert sand with subtle ripples and texture
hazy mountain silhouettes on the horizon
distant reddish architectural ruins or rock formations

segments.scene_description: The character walks across an expansive desert plain under a dramatic cloudy sky. A massive rock outcrop dominates the center distance while reddish structures are visible far to the right. The terrain is flat and sandy with no vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert ridge along rock formation with distant coastal cliffs

events.description: character executes a left turn to follow the base of the rock formation

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved sandy path at the base of the rock formation, with the cliff wall on the right and open desert views on the left

entered.detail: white layered cliff faces visible in the far distance across the desert
shimmering water or ice visible between the cliffs and the path

segments.scene_description: After turning left, the character walks along the base of the large rock formation which now dominates the right side of the frame. The view opens to reveal distant white cliffs and what appears to be water or ice in the far left distance. The sandy path continues along the rock wall under the dramatic cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a desolate desert plain that gradually reveals a vast, contrasting horizon of cliffs and water. It begins with the character traversing a flat, sandy expanse under a dramatic cloudy sky, heading toward a massive rock outcrop while reddish structures linger in the far distance. As the character turns left, the perspective shifts to follow the base of the towering rock formation, which now dominates the right side of the frame. The scene then opens up to the left, transitioning from the enclosed rock wall to a wide vista of distant white cliffs and shimmering water or ice. The camera finally continues along the sandy path, maintaining the scale of the rock wall against the expansive, clouded skyline.
